name: Babel
oracleText:
Babel, Shining Tower enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}: Each player draws a card, then discards a card.
flavorText: "Therefore is the name of it called Babel; because the Lord did there confound the language of all the earth." — Genesis 11:9
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme reuses the existing Early World Babel-era tower artwork for Babel.
title: Shining Tower
